name: linkedin-cli
description: Marketplace for the linkedin-cli plugin: drive personal LinkedIn workflows from the terminal — unofficial reads over your own session plus official OAuth publishing.

plugins.name: linkedin-cli
plugins.description: Skills that drive the linkedin-cli tool: setup and auth, unofficial reads (feed, saved, profiles, search), and official OAuth publishing (post text/media/article/reshare/update/delete) with sns-json-v1 output.
